D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

Magno vs Parvo Pathways

slide the spatial frequency and watch the fast magno and fine-detail parvo streams trade dominance

Retinal output splits in two: large magnocellular cells report fast, coarse, achromatic change, while small parvocellular cells carry fine detail and colour.

Slide the spatial frequency of the stimulus and watch the magno curve dominate coarse patterns while the parvo curve carries fine detail. Toggle a colour stimulus and watch the colour-blind magno pathway drop out.
